name: source_fingerprint

name: dataset_triage
value: PropellerArchiveDatasetTriage supplies row counts preset matches and coverage blockers.

name: curve_fit_plan
value: PropellerArchiveCurveFitPlan defines six required CT CP eta static and geometry fit families for four presets.
